name: BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics, Inc.
business: BBOT is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing a next-generation pipeline of novel small-molecule therapeutics targeting RAS and PI3K. The company's three lead product candidates are BBO-8520 (a KRAS G12C inhibitor), BBO-10203 (a RAS-PI3K inhibitor), and BBO-11818 (a pan-KRAS inhibitor). They are developing these candidates for patients with KRAS mutant non-small cell lung cancer and other solid tumors.
sellsTo: patients with KRAS G12C mutant non-small cell lung cancer
patients with locally advanced or metastatic HER2+ breast cancer
patients with KRAS mutant colorectal cancer
patients with KRAS mutant non-small cell lung cancer
patients with locally advanced or metastatic KRAS mutant solid tumors

exposures.sentence: BBOT is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing a next-generation pipeline of novel small-molecule therapeutics targeting RAS and Phosphoinositide 3-kinase (PI3K).

catalysts.sentence: Updated clinical data are expected in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: BBO-10203 initial Phase 1 clinical data expected
catalysts.sentence: Initial Phase 1 clinical data are expected in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: BBO-11818 initial Phase 1 clinical data expected
catalysts.sentence: Initial Phase 1 clinical data are expected in the second half of 2026.
The de-SPAC Transaction was consummated on August 11, 2025.
